inputs.name: github_token
inputs.description: GitHub personal access token used to authenticate API requests.

inputs.name: labels
inputs.description: List of label names to apply to the issue.

inputs.name: assignees
inputs.description: List of GitHub usernames to assign to the issue.

inputs.name: milestone
inputs.description: Milestone number (numeric ID) to attach to the issue. GitHub Issues API requires an integer milestone ID.

outputs.name: issue_created
outputs.description: True when an issue is successfully created in GitHub.

outputs.name: issue_number
outputs.description: Numeric issue number returned by GitHub; null if creation failed or mock mode is used.

outputs.name: issue_url
outputs.description: URL to the created issue in GitHub; null when unavailable or if creation failed.

outputs.name: issue_id
outputs.description: Provider issue identifier normalized to string for cross-provider consistency, even when GitHub returns a numeric id; null when unavailable or if creation fails.
